ModMetaData.name: War Orphans
ModMetaData.author: Anna
ModMetaData.description:
War-torn settlements beg you to take in their orphaned children. Three quest variants with deep narrative, trauma mechanics, and recovery arcs.
Quests: - War Orphans — up to 7 children from a faction's settlement, mixed xenotypes, sibling families - Persecuted Orphans — children hunted for their xenotype, all share one race - Sole Survivor — one child, everyone they knew is dead. Worst condition, but survival skills. Risk of retribution raid
The children arrive malnourished, injured, in tattered clothes, with war trauma that fades over time. As they recover, you'll see milestones — "the nightmares are less frequent", "starting to feel safe", and finally "this place is home."
Accepting orphans boosts colony mood and faction relations. Rejecting them has consequences. Works with Ideology charity precepts.
Requires Biotech DLC.
